search_query: best apps for improving study habits
retrieved_result: How to Put Parental Controls on YouTube - Hundreds of thousands of videos on YouTube are designed specifically with kids in mind. Parental controls help to ensure your children see these videos and not others that are age-inappropriate. Take advantage of the Safety Mode feature on YouTube to filter out content that's inappropriate for kids.
Decision_Reason: The result discusses YouTube parental controls, not apps for improving study habits.
